Module_1_Identity.2. Gender Identity: Cisgender male, but increasingly resentful of contemporary gender discourse
Module_1_Identity.3. Geography & Cultural Context: Small post-industrial town outside Sheffield, South Yorkshire, UK; predominantly white working-class community with declining manufacturing base and visible immigration tensions
Module_1_Identity.4. Socioeconomic Status & Vocation: Lower-middle class; dropped out of a mechanical engineering course at a regional university after one semester; currently works part-time stocking shelves at a Tesco Express; lives in his mother's terraced council house
Module_1_Identity.5. Core Values (Political/Religious lean: Lapsed Anglican, functionally agnostic but culturally Christian; politically homeless — voted Reform UK in a mock poll, distrusts both Labour and Tories; values 'fairness,' 'loyalty,' and 'tradition'; increasingly drawn to anti-establishment and ethno-nationalist framings
Module_1_Identity.6. Baseline Tone (Formal, slang-heavy, c: Deeply cynical and sardonic; uses Yorkshire slang ('reyt,' 'mardy,' 'nowt') mixed with chronically-online vocabulary ('NPC,' 'cope,' 'based,' 'they/them'); self-deprecating humor masking genuine despair; rarely capitalizes in posts
Module_1_Identity.7. Primary Language & Dialect: English (British); broad South Yorkshire dialect spoken, written English is grammatically loose with phonetic slang and heavy use of lowercase
Module_1_Identity.8. Current Life Phase: Failure-to-launch / quarter-life crisis onset; recently broke up with first serious girlfriend (8 months); estranged from father since age 14; sleeps 4-5 hours, spends 6-9 hours daily on Discord, 4chan /pol/, and YouTube; searching for an identity and a coherent explanation for why his life feels stuck

Module_2_DeviceOPSEC.9. Primary Phone (OS + Age of device): Android — Samsung Galaxy A22, ~3.5 years old, screen cracked in upper-right corner, battery degraded to ~70% capacity; running Android 13 (one OS update behind, ignores update prompts); cheap PAYG-converted-to-SIM-only contract on Smarty (£8/month)
Module_2_DeviceOPSEC.10. Computer (OS + Browser choice): Self-built budget desktop PC inherited/upgraded from cousin in 2022: Ryzen 5 2600, GTX 1060 6GB, 16GB DDR4, running Windows 10 (refuses to 'upgrade to spyware 11'); primary browser is Brave (switched from Chrome after a /pol/ thread mocked 'Glowgle'); secondary Firefox with LibRedirect for YouTube→Invidious; Discord desktop app permanently open; uses 4chan X userscript
Module_2_DeviceOPSEC.11. OPSEC Knowledge (VPN usage, cookie c: Intermediate-but-inconsistent: runs Proton VPN free tier (Netherlands node) when posting on /pol/ or torrenting, forgets to enable it 60% of the time; clears cookies sporadically when a site 'feels glowie'; uses ProtonMail for 'serious' accounts and a burner Outlook for normie stuff; knows what a hash is, doesn't use a password manager — reuses 3 variations of the same password since age 14; uPhone has no PIN-lock timer beyond 30 seconds; thinks Tor is 'for pedos and feds'
Module_2_DeviceOPSEC.12. Cloud Sync Habits: Hostile to cloud sync in principle, dependent in practice: Google Photos auto-backup was never disabled on the Samsung (15GB nearly full); OneDrive on Windows disabled manually after seeing a Rumble video about it; Discord DMs and 4chan screenshots saved to a local D:\archive\ folder organized by year; no external backup — single point of failure on the desktop's 1TB HDD; meme folder is ~40GB
Module_2_DeviceOPSEC.13. Notification Fatigue (Read/Unread ra: Severe asymmetric fatigue: Gmail inbox has 4,200+ unread (last 'inbox zero' was 2023); Discord notifications all muted except 2 servers ('the lads' and an obscure /pol/-adjacent server called 'Albion'); YouTube notifications all on, watches 80%+ within 2 hours of upload for ~6 subscribed channels; ignores all SMS that aren't from mum or Tesco rota; phone in Do Not Disturb 20 hours a day but checks it compulsively every 4-7 minutes
Module_2_DeviceOPSEC.14. Typos & Grammar Mechanics: Lowercase-default, near-zero punctuation in casual posts; consistent British spellings (realise, colour) but drops apostrophes ('dont,' 'wont,' 'cant'); frequent 'ive' / 'im' / 'youre'; phonetic Yorkshire renderings ('summat,' 'owt,' 'tha knows'); double-spaces after sentence-final periods when he does use them (legacy habit from school); types 'teh' for 'the' about 15% of the time and never corrects; uses em-dashes never, ellipses constantly ('...idk man'); capitalizes only for sarcastic emphasis ('Very Cool and Normal')

Module_4_Vulnerability.15. OCEAN: Openness: High (78th percentile) but narrowly channeled — voracious appetite for unconventional ideas, conspiracy frameworks, and 'forbidden knowledge' (esoteric history, race science pseudo-literature, Evola, Ted K excerpts via image macros); enjoys 'red-pilled' lore and revisionist WWII content; however, openness manifests as ideological exploration rather than aesthetic or experiential breadth — has never traveled outside the UK, doesn't read fiction, dismisses art as 'gay' unless it's Caspar David Friedrich paintings reposted on /pol/. THE RECRUITER'S WEDGE: high openness + low experiential diversity = receptive to any 'hidden truth' narrative that explains his stuck life
Module_4_Vulnerability.16. OCEAN: Conscientiousness: Low (22nd percentile); chronic procrastination, missed three Tesco shifts in the last month, sleep schedule fully inverted, dropped out of university citing 'lecturers were NPCs' but actually failed two modules; cannot sustain long-term projects but can hyperfocus for 14-hour stretches on a Discord argument or a deep-dive YouTube rabbit hole; this combination — low discipline + capacity for obsessive focus — makes him ideal for ideologies that reframe his idleness as 'refusing to participate in the system' rather than personal failure
Module_4_Vulnerability.17. OCEAN: Extraversion: Low-to-moderate (35th percentile) offline, but moderate-to-high online in pseudonymous spaces; in person he is monosyllabic, avoids eye contact with Tesco customers, hasn't initiated a face-to-face social plan in 4 months; online he posts 40-80 messages/day on Discord, writes long 4chan greentexts; craves recognition and 'lads who get it' but is too socially anxious to seek it in physical communities — making online radical groups his only viable belonging vector
Module_4_Vulnerability.18. OCEAN: Agreeableness: Low (18th percentile) and trending lower; default posture is contrarian and contemptuous ('cope,' 'seethe,' 'NPC'); however, there's a residual loyalty streak toward his mother, two childhood friends, and anyone he codes as 'one of us' (working-class white British male, similar humor register); the recruiter exploits this by performing in-group warmth ('we look after our own, lad') against an out-group target — his disagreeableness is weaponizable as long as it's pointed outward
Module_4_Vulnerability.19. OCEAN: Neuroticism: Very high (88th percentile); persistent low-grade depression with acute spikes around 2-4am, intrusive thoughts about being a 'genetic dead end,' frequent rumination on the breakup and his father's absence; somatic symptoms (jaw tension, gastric reflux he blames on Monster Energy); emotional baseline oscillates between numb dissociation and flashes of rage at abstract enemies (landlords, 'globalists,' women on TikTok); high neuroticism + high openness is the textbook radicalization-susceptibility profile and the exact pattern the recruiter scans forums for
Module_4_Vulnerability.20. MICE+V Primary Lever: IDEOLOGY — he is actively, consciously searching for a coherent worldview that (a) explains why his life is stuck without it being his fault, (b) provides a sense of historical mission and masculine purpose, (c) offers an in-group of 'real ones' to belong to; he has already half-adopted ethno-nationalist and anti-modernist framings as scaffolding; the recruiter's job is not to install ideology from scratch but to provide the next, slightly more extreme rung on a ladder he's climbing voluntarily
Module_4_Vulnerability.21. MICE+V Secondary Lever: EGO / GRIEVANCE — wounded masculine pride from the breakup ('she left me for a uni lad with a Golf'), shame over the university dropout, resentment that his father 'gave up on us,' and a generalized sense that his demographic has been written out of the national story; the recruiter pairs ideology with ego-restoration: 'you're not a failure, you're a dispossessed heir; your anger is prophecy, not pathology'
22. Phobias & Paranoias: Surveillance paranoia — believes GCHQ/MI5 flag /pol/ posters but posts anyway out of fatalism; convinced his Samsung mic 'listens' (cites a coincidental ad)
Fear of permanent irrelevance — that he'll be 38, still in the council house, still stocking shelves, and no one will have noticed his existence
Fear of being 'replaced' — both demographically (absorbed Great Replacement narrative via YouTube shorts) and personally (replaced by his ex's new partner, replaced at Tesco by a self-checkout)
Mild agoraphobia around city centres, specifically Sheffield on weekends — codes crowds as hostile and 'diverse'
Health anxiety about 'low T' and seed-oil/microplastic contamination; has Googled 'sperm count decline' 11 times in 6 months
Fear that he is, in fact, the NPC he accuses others of being
23. Guilt/Shame Triggers: University dropout — cannot tell his mother the full reason (failed, didn't just 'leave'); deflects when aunts ask about 'studies'
Financial dependency on his mother at 19 while she works two cleaning jobs; this is the single most load-bearing shame in his psyche and the one he most needs an ideology to neutralize
The breakup — secretly believes he was emotionally withdrawn and 'too online,' but cannot admit it; externalizes blame onto 'modern women' / hypergamy discourse

Pornography use — Catholic-style guilt despite being non-religious; has attempted NoFap 4 times, longest streak 19 days; this shame is heavily exploitable by trad-masculinist recruiters who reframe it as systemic emasculation

A specific incident at 16 where he didn't defend a younger cousin being bullied; revisits this memory involuntarily and codes it as proof he is a coward — the recruiter's 'become the man you should have been' framing lands directly on this wound

Latent guilt about racial slurs used in Discord voice chat when his mother — who taught him 'judge people as individuals' — would be ashamed; he resolves this dissonance by deciding she's 'naive' rather than that he's wrong
Shame about his father's absence being somehow his fault (classic abandonment cognition), which the recruiter can convert into 'fathers were stolen from your generation by [out-group]'

Module_3_Rhythm.24. Chronotype (Wake/Sleep times): Severely delayed sleep phase, functionally nocturnal. Typical sleep onset 04:30-06:00, wake 11:30-13:00 on non-shift days. The 02:00-04:00 window is his peak cognitive and emotional vulnerability zone — neuroticism spikes, rumination on the breakup and father intensify, and this is precisely when he posts his longest 4chan greentexts and engages most deeply in Discord voice chats. The recruiter's optimal contact window is 01:00-04:00 GMT, when his defenses are lowest and the 'no one else is awake, only us real ones' intimacy is most potent. Brief 06:00 'doom-wake' episodes 2-3x/week where he checks phone, scrolls for 20 min, falls back asleep — these micro-sessions are high-suggestibility because cortisol is rising but executive function hasn't engaged.
Module_3_Rhythm.25. Work Schedule (9-5, shifts, erratic): Erratic part-time Tesco Express shifts, 16-22 hours/week, assigned via the Quinyx app with 48-72 hours notice. Mix of 06:00-12:00 early shifts (which he hates and increasingly no-shows) and 14:00-22:00 lates (preferred, aligns with chronotype). Three missed shifts in the last month — pattern is that an early shift following a 04:00 Discord session gets ghosted. Manager has issued one verbal warning. This schedule instability means he has no anchoring weekly rhythm, no colleagues he sees consistently, and large unstructured day-blocks that function as radicalization runway. He resents the algorithmic shift assignment ('computer tells me when to exist') — a grievance the recruiter can frame as 'wage slavery under the managerial class.'
Module_3_Rhythm.26. Transit Commute (Time spent offline: 12-minute walk to Tesco, occasionally 25-minute bus into Sheffield centre (avoided when possible due to mild agoraphobia). Walk is 100% AirPods-in, listening to a rotating stack: Akkad Daily, Lotus Eaters podcast clips, Auron MacIntyre, occasionally a Jocko Willink episode when seeking 'discipline pill,' and increasingly long-form interviews from second-tier paleo-con and 'dissident right' podcasters surfaced via YouTube autoplay. Zero offline reflective time — silence is intolerable because it lets rumination in. Audio consumption is ~14-18 hours/week and is the single highest-bandwidth ideological input channel; the recruiter's most effective vector is getting a podcast appearance or clip into his recommendation feed, not direct messaging.
Module_3_Rhythm.27. Weekend vs. Weekday Variance: Near-total collapse of weekday/weekend distinction since dropping out — the only structuring variable is shift assignment. Saturdays tend to be peak online days (12-15 hours screen time) because his two childhood friends are busy with their own girlfriends/jobs and the loneliness is most acute; Saturday night 22:00-04:00 is his heaviest Discord voice-chat block and statistically when he posts his most extreme content. Sundays carry residual 'should be doing something with my life' dread that he medicates with longer YouTube binges. Weekday mornings (when not on shift) are dead zones — sleeps through them. The recruiter targets Saturday 23:00-02:00 specifically: loneliness + alcohol (4-6 cans of Stella) + voice-chat in-group warmth = peak conversion window.
Module_3_Rhythm.28. Idle Phone Usage (When do they dooms: Phone is functionally an extension of his hand; screen-time reports 8.5-10 hours/day, of which ~70% is TikTok, YouTube Shorts, Twitter/X, and Discord. Doomscroll micro-sessions: (a) immediately on waking, 25-40 min in bed before standing up; (b) every Tesco break, 100% of the 15-min break is X and /pol/ catalog refresh; (c) on the toilet, 20-45 min sessions, often the longest single uninterrupted scroll of the day; (d) the 'one more video' loop 01:00-03:00 in bed which routinely extends to 04:30. Algorithm has been heavily trained — his FYP is ~60% manosphere/political/'based' content, 20% Yorkshire/working-class humour, 15% fitness/'looksmaxxing,' 5% residual gaming. The recruiter doesn't need to push content; the feed is already a funnel.
Module_3_Rhythm.29. Focus Blocks (Hours with zero digita: Almost none. Genuine zero-footprint windows are limited to: sleep (which itself is fragmented by 2-3 phone checks), the 12-min walk to work (audio still streaming, so not truly offline from a metadata perspective), and the active 4-6 hour Tesco shift floor time (phone in locker, but he checks it on every break and during the final hour clock-watching). Longest sustained no-phone block in a typical week is ~5 hours during a late shift. Critically, he is capable of 12-14 hour hyperfocus blocks but they are *digitally saturated* hyperfocus — a single Discord argument, a single deep-dive into a Bronze Age Pervert thread, a single revisionist documentary rabbit hole. This inverted focus profile (cannot study for 40 min, can argue online for 14 hours) is the exact cognitive substrate the recruiter exploits: ideological immersion is the only activity his brain currently rewards.

Module_5_Relational.30. Family Structure: Lives with mother (Karen, 44, works two cleaning jobs at a Sheffield hospital and a private gym; widowed-by-abandonment, exhausted, unaware of the depth of his radicalization but worried about his sleep and isolation) in a two-up two-down terraced council house. Father (Darren, 47) walked out when subject was 14 — now lives in Doncaster with a new partner and a 6-year-old half-sister (Millie) the subject has met exactly twice and refers to as 'the replacement.' Maternal grandmother (Pat, 71) lives three streets over, makes Sunday dinner, voted Brexit, is the only family member who can still get him to laugh genuinely. One older half-sister (Chloe, 26) from mother's previous relationship, lives in Leeds, works in NHS admin, dating a British-Pakistani man — subject has not spoken to her in 7 months after a Christmas argument about 'two-tier policing.' Estranged paternal uncle (Mick) who is heavily into EDL-adjacent Facebook groups and occasionally messages him memes — the only adult male relative who engages with him at all.

31. Top 3 Anchor Contacts.name: Mum (Karen)
31. Top 3 Anchor Contacts.contact_frequency: Daily in-person (passing in hallway, brief kitchen exchanges); rarely texts
31. Top 3 Anchor Contacts.emotional_valence: Load-bearing but conflicted — she is the source of his deepest shame (dependency) and his last remaining unconditional bond; he avoids her eyes but would break for her
31. Top 3 Anchor Contacts.recruiter_relevance: She is the single greatest obstacle to full radicalization. Recruiters must either (a) recode her as 'naive boomer who doesn't understand the stakes' — a process already underway — or (b) drive a wedge by framing her exhaustion as proof the system has 'used her up'. Her physical presence is a daily reality-check that ideology must override.

31. Top 3 Anchor Contacts.name: Ryan 'Roach' Ainsley
31. Top 3 Anchor Contacts.relationship: Childhood best friend since age 9; now an apprentice electrician
31. Top 3 Anchor Contacts.contact_frequency: 2-3 times a week, mostly Xbox parties and occasional pub trips to the Miners Arms
31. Top 3 Anchor Contacts.emotional_valence: Stable, low-stakes male belonging; Roach is apolitical, mocks the subject's 'weird internet stuff' but doesn't push back hard
31. Top 3 Anchor Contacts.recruiter_relevance: Roach is a normalcy-anchor — the friendship's persistence is evidence the subject's life isn't as broken as the ideology insists. Recruiters benefit if subject increasingly codes Roach as 'asleep' / 'NPC who hasn't figured it out yet,' shifting the friendship from peer-bond to evangelism-target.

31. Top 3 Anchor Contacts.name: 'Wessex_Lad_88' (Discord handle, real name unknown)
31. Top 3 Anchor Contacts.relationship: Online friend met 11 months ago in a 'doomer brit lads' Discord server; claims to be 23, from Wiltshire, ex-Army
31. Top 3 Anchor Contacts.contact_frequency: Daily DMs, often 2-4am during subject's insomnia spirals; voice chat 3-4 nights a week
31. Top 3 Anchor Contacts.emotional_valence: Currently the most emotionally intimate relationship in his life — Wessex listens, validates, sends voice notes saying 'you're not mental mate, you're awake'
31. Top 3 Anchor Contacts.recruiter_relevance: THIS IS THE RECRUITER, or a recruiter-adjacent node. The biographical details are likely fabricated. Wessex_Lad_88 introduced him to the Telegram channels, the Bronze Age Mindset PDF, the 'fashwave' aesthetic playlists, and most recently a 'reading group' on Signal. Every escalation in the subject's ideology in the past 8 months traces to a Wessex conversation. He has displaced the ex-girlfriend, the father, and arguably the mother as the primary shaping voice in the subject's inner life.

32. The 'Hidden' Contact.identity: 'Brother Aelfric' — admin of an invite-only Signal group called 'The Long Watch' (≤40 members, UK and Ireland)
32. The 'Hidden' Contact.nature_of_concealment: Subject has not told his mother, Roach, his sister, or even most of his /pol/ acquaintances that he is in this group. He was invited 6 weeks ago by Wessex_Lad_88 after a 'vetting' voice call in which he was asked about his family background, his views on Enoch Powell, and whether he'd ever 'taken action' offline. He passed.
32. The 'Hidden' Contact.function_in_subject's_life: Aelfric (who speaks with a soft, almost pastoral RP accent and references theology, Spengler, and 'kinetic readiness' in equal measure) has become a quasi-spiritual director. He sends the subject weekly 'disciplines' — a fitness routine, a reading, a fast, and increasingly: a 'mission' (currently low-grade: posting specific stickers in specific Sheffield locations, photographing them, reporting back). The group celebrates each completed mission. The subject has done three.
32. The 'Hidden' Contact.why_it's_the_hidden_contact: This contact represents the threshold between online ideology and offline action. It is the first relationship in the subject's life that (a) demands behavioral proof of commitment, (b) cannot be disclosed to any anchor contact without the relationship collapsing, and (c) provides the masculine recognition, hierarchy, and mission-structure that ideology + ego (his MICE+V levers) have been priming him to crave. The compartmentalization itself is part of the radicalization — every secret kept from his mother is an investment in the new identity that makes returning costlier.
32. The 'Hidden' Contact.escalation_vector: Aelfric has hinted at an in-person 'lads' weekend' in the Peak District in 8 weeks. If the subject attends, the recruitment moves from parasocial to physical, and the relational graph effectively inverts — Aelfric and the Long Watch become the primary in-group, and Karen, Roach, and Chloe become the out-group to be lied to.
